2023 / active / updated Aug 5, 2023

docker-setup

Ubuntu Docker setup with zsh configured for a usable terminal image.

#docker#zsh#terminal#environment

docker-setup captures an opinionated terminal environment in a Docker image. It is useful for reproducible shell workflows and quick throwaway environments.

source
